pr_title: SDLC-27: Fix case-insensitive flight search by destination airport
pr_body:
## Summary
Fix `/flights/search` so destination airport filtering matches case-insensitively when airport codes are stored in uppercase.

## What changes
- Normalize the destination search input in `backend/app/services/flight_service.py`
- Add a regression test in `backend/app/tests/test_flight_service.py`

## Why
A request like `GET /flights/search?destination=jfk` currently returns no flights even when matching flights exist with destination `JFK`.

## Validation
- Added/updated test coverage for lowercase destination input
- Confirmed existing search behavior remains unchanged

## Notes
This is a localized fix in the flight search service layer; no data migration is required.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
